case_title: FERNANDO DIMAS et al VS. MARK A. BRETT DBA ISLAND EARTH FARMER'S MARKET et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2010 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM

COURT TRIAL ON MAY-11-2010 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON MAY-11-2010 BY DONALD SULLIVAN. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD J. SULLIVAN, CLERK: V. MACK, NOT REPORTED (D318)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT MARK A. BRETT DBA ISLAND EARTH FARMER'S MARKET ISLAND EARTH FARMERS MARKET ASSOCIATION TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT DIMAS, FERNANDO PALOMINO, MARTHA AND RESPONDENT TAKES NOTHING FROM APPELLANT. THIS IS THE FINAL DECISION OF THE APPELLATE COURT AND THIS DECISION REPLACES ANY DECISION RENDERED BY THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mark A. Brett dba Island Earth Farmer's Market, Appellant/Defendant, with Holly Brett.
Fernando Dimas and Martha Palomino, Respondents/Plaintiffs, are also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo, continued from May 6, 2010. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Fernando Dimas testifies on his own behalf. Prior documentary evidence is re-introduced.

Holly Brett and Mark A. Brett testify. Prior documentary evidence is re-introduced.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Exhibits from both sides retained.

Judge Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk V. Mack, Not Reported (D318)

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Continued To May-11-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 318
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mark A. Brett dba Island Earth farmer's Market, Appellant/Defendant, present.
Fernando Dimas and Martha Palomino, Respondents/Plaintiffs, are also present.

This trial de novo is continued to Tuesday, May 11, 2010 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 318 by request and agreement of the parties.

Judge Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: V. Mack, not reported (D318)
